title: ceratosanthes corniculata
intro: Ceratosanthes corniculata, also known as the horned vine or wild yam, is a perennial climbing plant native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ceratosanthes corniculata include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, Ceratosanthes corniculata is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
